title: ODS-E Maintenance History
description: Work order record capturing corrective, preventive, or condition-based maintenance activity on a piece of equipment

work_order_id.description: Unique work order identifier from the source ERP/EAM system

reported_date.description: Date and time the work order was reported (ISO 8601)

completed_date.description: Date and time the work order was completed (ISO 8601)

source_equipment_id.description: Native equipment identifier in the originating ERP or SCADA system

downtime_hours.description: Total equipment downtime attributed to this work order in hours

failure_code.description: Failure code from the ERP failure taxonomy

cause_code.description: Root cause code from the ERP failure taxonomy

total_cost.description: Total cost of the work order including labor, parts, and services

part_id.description: Spare part identifier consumed in this work order

parts_consumed.description: List of spare parts consumed during this maintenance activity
